name: Kimi K3
description: Kimi K3 is Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter native multimodal model for software engineering, knowledge work, and deep reasoning. It uses Kimi Delta Attention, Attention Residuals, and a Stable LatentMoE architecture that activates 16 of 896 experts, accepts text, image, and video input, and supports a 1,048,576-token context window.

details.name: architecture
details.value: Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals with Stable LatentMoE; 16 of 896 experts activate per token.

details.name: context_caching
details.value: Automatic for regular requests; no cache ID, TTL, or extra parameter is required.

details.name: availability_note
details.value: Moonshot AI has published Kimi K3 API documentation and pricing. Moonshot AI is the only confirmed API provider currently listed; full model weights and the technical report are still forthcoming.
